SafetyAgent.name: Safety Goal
SafetyAgent.description: Safety objective for Library: Librarians must be able to add new books, remove books, and manage member accounts

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 1
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): Librarians must be able to add new books, remove books, and manage member accounts
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 2
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): A library management system must allow library members to borrow and return books
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 3
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): The system must track which books are available, which are borrowed, and by whom
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 4
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): Members must be able to search for books by title, author, or ISBN
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 5
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): The system must enforce borrowing limits (e
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 6
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): , maximum number of books per member) and track overdue books
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 7
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): Librarians must be able to add new books, remove books, and manage member accounts
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention
